case_title: HELEN SOLI et al VS. PROFESSIONAL CCS CLEANING SERVICE

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,950.00 FILED BY SOLI, HELEN SOLI, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL CCS CLEANING SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED - JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF.

RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 7/7/11 TO PROFESSIONAL CCS CLEANING SERVICE
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-21-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-26-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLI, HELEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-26-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLI, HELEN SOLI, ERIC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-14-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT DOES NOT ACCEPT PROOF OF SERVICE PLAINTIFF PRESENTED IN COURT. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-17-2012 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
